_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead or enable exploitation operations in support of organization objectives and target requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.593), LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.583).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.303). Shared vocabulary: [lead]. DCWF-only terms [enable, exploitation, objectives, operations, organization, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.873, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Lead or enable exploitation operations in support of organization objectives and" and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 > STS 0.303 (gap +0.294). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [lead] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [lead]. DCWF-only: [enable, exploitation, objectives, operations, organization, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication].
